title: 🤑 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026 📈: A Step-by-Step Guide 🏦
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Mudra Loan Eligibility and Process
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. Check eligibility, required documents, and the step-by-step application process for Mudra Loan.
tableOfContents: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
intro: 📈 Are you a small business owner or entrepreneur looking for financial assistance to grow your venture? 🤔 The PM Mudra Loan scheme, launched by the Government of India, provides collateral-free loans to non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activities. 🤑 In this article, we will guide you through the process of applying for a PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. 📊

sections.heading: 🏦 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: The PM Mudra Loan scheme is a flagship program of the Government of India, aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and job creation in the country. 🌟 The scheme provides loans up to ₹10 lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm sector income-generating activities, such as small businesses, artisans, and self-employed individuals. 🎨 The loan can be used for various purposes, including working capital, equipment purchase, and business expansion.

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: ✅ You must be a citizen of India. 🇮🇳 ✅ You must be above 18 years of age. 🎂 ✅ You must have a viable business plan or proposal. 📊 ✅ You must not have any pending loans or credit issues. 🚫

sections.heading: 📁 Required Documents for PM Mudra Loan
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan, you will need to submit the following documents: 📄 ✅ Identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.) 📝 ✅ Address proof (passport, driving license, etc.) 📍 ✅ Business plan or proposal 📊 ✅ Income proof (salary slip, income tax return, etc.) 💸

sections.heading: 📈 Step-by-Step Online Application Process
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: 📊 ✅ Visit the official website of the lender or the PM Mudra Loan portal. 🌐 ✅ Fill in the online application form with your personal and business details. 📝 ✅ Upload the required documents. 📄 ✅ Submit the application form and wait for the lender to review and approve your loan. 🕒

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for PM Mudra Loan?
faqs.a: The interest rate for PM Mudra Loan varies between 8.5% to 12.5% per annum, depending on the lender and loan amount.

faqs.q: How long does it take to process a PM Mudra Loan application?
faqs.a: The processing time for a PM Mudra Loan application typically takes 7-10 working days, depending on the lender and the complexity of the application.
